# Copilot Workspace Instructions

- Use Bun for JavaScript and TypeScript runtime execution.
- Use `bun run <script>` instead of `node <file>` when a package script exists.
- Use `bun <file>` instead of `node <file>` for direct script execution.
- Use Bun package management commands (`bun install`, `bun add`, `bun remove`) instead of npm/yarn/pnpm.
- Use `bunx <tool>` instead of `npx <tool>`.
- Prefer commands and examples in this repository that use Bun and Bunx by default.
